bio:
I work part-time as a receptionist at The Pet Studio and I really enjoy meeting and greeting customers, booking appointments and generally tidying up!

I am fascinated watching the whole grooming process from welcoming the dogs as they arrive, the health check, bathing, grooming, nail clipping, ear and teeth cleaning and finally the excitement as they are reunited with their owners.

I recently adopted a little rescue dog called Lewi. He has become my constant companion and even comes to work with me where he is an enthusiastic "meeter and greeter" of our canine customers 🐶
